input.company_description: Office services provider handling managed print, document shredding, and IT asset disposition for mid-size law firms and financial services companies. 95 employees, mostly in the Southeast. Growing 20% YoY but sales team still tracks leads in spreadsheets.

pain_points: sales team tracking leads in spreadsheets while growing 20% YoY
no CRM to manage pipeline across law firm and financial services verticals
scaling a service-heavy business in the Southeast without ops infrastructure
expected_output.reasoning: Growing SMB with clear sales ops pain, but niche services and small size limit the complexity and budget that make outbound campaigns high-ROI.
